source_pr.title: codec: improve the performance of decoding decimal

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: codec: improve the performance of decoding decimal.
